S.FORM: pinacadan a ademiad unu ŚéüšĹŹśįĎademiad iniay 1984 a mihcaan waluway abulad cacay ademiad ani patidengŚĎäÁü•u pinacadan a angangan sayaway mueneng i tayni a tademaw , u sapakatineng tu itiniay a tademaw kiyu iwaluway bulad cacay ademiad nu pinacadan patideng tu numita kuŚéüšĹŹśįĎśó•akawaw sakaku , sisa katieng ku pinacadan
S.PHON: pina ¶adan a ad…ômiad unu ***ad…ômiad iniaj **** a mińß ¶aan war~…ĺuwaj abur~…ĺad ¶a ¶aj ad…ômiad ani patid…ôŇč**u pina ¶adan a aŇčaŇčan sajawaj mu…ôn…ôŇč i tajni a tad…ômaw , u sapakatin…ôŇč tu itiniaj a tad…ômaw kiju iwar~…ĺuwaj bur~…ĺad ¶a ¶aj ad…ômiad nu pina ¶adan patid…ôŇč tu numita ku****akawaw sakaku , sisa kati…ôŇč ku pina ¶adan
S.FORM: pinacadan a ademiad unu ŚéüšĹŹśįĎademiad iniay 1984 a mihcaan waluway abulad cacay ademiad ani patidengŚĎäÁü•u pinacadan a angangan sayaway mueneng i tayni a tademaw , u sapakatineng tu itiniay a tademaw kiyu iwaluway bulad cacay ademiad nu pinacadan patideng tu numita kuŚéüšĹŹśįĎśó•akawaw sakaku , sisa katieng ku pinacadan
